restaurants.name: BON! Café
restaurants.ambience: Modern café-bakery popular with locals for light lunches, freshly baked breads, and good coffee
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Coffee Nation Tashkent
restaurants.ambience: A stylish café known for excellent coffee and quick lunch options
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Tim's Coffee & Roastery
restaurants.ambience: A cozy specialty coffee café offering quality brews and light café food in a relaxed atmosphere
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Afsona Shevchenko
restaurants.ambience: A stylish restaurant offering modern Uzbek cuisine with elegant presentation
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Restaurant Caravan
restaurants.ambience: One of the most famous restaurants in Tashkent, known for its beautiful Central Asian décor and authentic Uzbek cuisine
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Safia Cafe & Bakery
restaurants.ambience: A well-known local café chain in Tashkent famous for its pastries, sandwiches, and light café meals
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Raspberry Coffee Roasters
restaurants.ambience: A small specialty coffee café known for excellent coffee and quick café-style snacks
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Space Coffee
restaurants.ambience: A cozy coffee spot offering light meals and pastries with a relaxed atmosphere
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Vlad`s Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A small local restaurant popular for grilled meats and Uzbek comfort food. Casual and authentic dining experience
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: National Food Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A well-known restaurant serving authentic Uzbek cuisine in a traditional setting
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Silk96 Wine & Lounge
restaurants.ambience: A modern lounge restaurant with international cuisine and a relaxed ambiance, ideal for evening dining
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Jago
restaurants.ambience: A casual restaurant popular among locals for Uzbek comfort food
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Bek Cafe
restaurants.ambience: A popular local restaurant known for serving traditional Uzbek cuisine in a relaxed and casual setting
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Yoree
restaurants.ambience: A well-known Korean restaurant in Tashkent offering Korean and Asian dishes
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Tashkent City Park
attractions.description: A beautifully designed contemporary urban park with landscaped gardens, a lake promenade, fountains, cafés, and entertainment areas
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: WWII Memorial
attractions.description: This peaceful memorial honors Uzbek soldiers who fought during World War II. The beautifully landscaped gardens, solemn sculptures, and memorial halls create a reflective atmosphere
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Independence Square (Mustaqillik Maydoni)
attractions.description: One of the most important landmarks in Uzbekistan, Independence Square symbolizes the country's sovereignty and national identity
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Hazrati Imam complex
attractions.description: This historic religious complex is one of the most important Islamic centers in Uzbekistan. Dating back several centuries, the complex houses beautiful madrasas, mosques, and courtyards
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Muyi Muborak Madrasah
attractions.description: Located within the Hazrat Imam complex, this madrasa houses one of the most treasured relics in the Islamic world - the Uthman Quran
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Tillya Sheikh Mosque
attractions.description: Another highlight of the complex, Tillya Sheikh Mosque is known for its elegant Islamic architecture and tranquil courtyard
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Chorsu Bozor (Chorsu Bazaar)
attractions.description: Located in the heart of the old city, Chorsu Bazaar is one of Tashkent's oldest and most colorful markets
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Hoja Ahror Juma Mosque
attractions.description: Also known as the Friday Mosque, this beautiful mosque dates back to the 15th century and remains an important religious site for locals
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx
